meta.title: {bride} & {groom} — Saturday, 3 April 2027 · Seoul
meta.description: Everything you need for {bride} & {groom}'s wedding in Seoul on Saturday, 3 April 2027 — venue, directions, hotels and dress code.

hero.welcome: And we would love nothing more than to celebrate with you in Seoul, under the cherry blossoms.

photos.venueAlt: The Ramada Seoul Sindorim Hotel — photo coming soon

day.title: At a Glance
day.receptionValue: Immediately following, at the Sky Garden on the 14th floor

location.title: Getting There
location.addressKrLabel: Korean address — show this to your driver
location.mapTitle: Map of the Ramada Seoul Sindorim Hotel
location.sindorim: Lines 1 & 2, Exit 5 — about a 10-minute walk (600 m).
location.icn: About 60–75 minutes by taxi or AREX train. Airport limousine bus 6018 runs toward Sindorim Station.
location.gmp: About a 30-minute drive — the closer, easier airport.
location.taxi: Show the driver the Korean address above — it's the most reliable way to arrive.

stay.title: Where to Stay
stay.intro: Four places we trust — from a room in the wedding building itself to a short taxi ride away.
stay.ramadaDesc: Stay in the same building as the wedding — the simplest option of all. A comfortable 4-star with 104 rooms, a fitness centre and breakfast at Café Rara.
stay.ramadaCallout: Preferential room rates are available for our wedding guests — when booking, mention the {bride} & {groom} wedding on 3 April 2027, or use group code {groupCode}.
stay.linkDesc: The newest and best-rated hotel nearby (Marriott, 4.5★), a 2-minute walk from the Ramada. Spacious modern rooms, a pool, a gym and English-speaking staff.
stay.fairfieldDesc: A reliable international mid-range choice, one Line 1 stop east (about 10 minutes by taxi). Compact but spotless rooms and English-speaking staff.
stay.lotteDesc: A comfortable 4-star near Guro Digital Complex (about 10 minutes by taxi south). The airport limousine bus stops right at the door — handy from Incheon, or for older relatives.

dress.title: Dress Code
dress.men: Men: a suit or a smart jacket with a collared shirt — tie optional.
dress.women: Women: a cocktail dress or an elegant outfit.
dress.avoid: Please avoid all-white looks (reserved for the bride) and very casual wear such as jeans, trainers or shorts.
dress.weather: Early April in Seoul is mild but cool — around 12–17 °C by day, with chilly evenings near 5 °C. It's cherry-blossom season and sometimes breezy, so bring a light coat or wrap.

know.title: Good to Know
know.rsvp: Please reply by {rsvpDate} — a click in your Paperless Post invitation is enough, or just send us a message:
know.gifts: In Korea, wedding gifts work a little differently: instead of wrapped presents, guests bring a simple envelope of cash (축의금, chugeuigeum) and hand it in at the welcome desk on the way in.
know.questions: A quick WhatsApp message or email is the fastest way to reach us — someone from the wedding party will get back to you right away:

footer.dateLine: Saturday, 3 April 2027 · Ramada Seoul Sindorim Hotel
footer.closing: We can't wait to see you in Seoul.
